error_signature: redirects back to the sign-in page
title: Redirecting to sign-in page due to role configuration
symptom: After logging in, the user is redirected to the dashboard but is then sent back to the sign-in page when navigating to other pages.
applies_when: Roles are set up as an enum list
not_this_if: User has all required roles for access
Access works in the editor but not on the published site
root_cause: The configuration requires users to have all roles defined in a user group to access certain pages, which is an AND condition. If a user does not meet this requirement, they will be redirected to the sign-in page.
fix_steps: Create a separate user group for each role in Xano
Assign the appropriate user group to each page with an OR condition
Test the access for users with different roles
agent_instruction: Create individual user groups for each role and adjust page access conditions accordingly.
